Apple___Apple_scab.description: Apple scab is a fungal disease causing dark spots on leaves and fruits.
Apple___Apple_scab.treatment: Apply fungicides like Captan or Mancozeb.
Apple___Apple_scab.prevention: Remove fallen leaves and ensure proper air circulation.

Apple___Black_rot.description: Black rot causes leaf spots and fruit rot in apple plants.
Apple___Black_rot.prevention: Prune infected branches and maintain orchard hygiene.

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.description: Fungal disease causing orange-yellow spots on leaves.
Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.prevention: Remove nearby cedar trees if possible.

Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.description: Powdery mildew causes white powder-like growth on leaves.
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.treatment: Apply sulfur or potassium bicarbonate fungicide.
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Improve air circulation and avoid overhead watering.

Cherry_(including_sour)___healthy.prevention: Regular monitoring and good irrigation practices.

Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.description: Gray leaf spot causes rectangular lesions on corn leaves.
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.prevention: Rotate crops and use resistant hybrids.

Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.description: Rust causes reddish-brown pustules on leaves.

Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.description: Elongated gray-green lesions appear on leaves.

Grape___Black_rot.description: Black rot is a fungal disease affecting grape leaves and fruits.
Grape___Black_rot.prevention: Remove infected leaves and improve airflow.

Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).description: Esca causes dark streaks and leaf discoloration.

Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.description: Leaf blight causes brown spots on grape leaves.

Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).description: Citrus greening is a serious bacterial disease.
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).treatment: No complete cure; remove infected trees.

Peach___Bacterial_spot.description: Bacterial spot causes dark lesions on leaves.

Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.description: Bacterial spot causes small dark spots on leaves.

Potato___Early_blight.description: Early blight causes concentric dark spots on leaves.

Squash___Powdery_mildew.description: White powder appears on squash leaves.

Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.description: Leaf scorch causes red or brown patches.

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.description: Bacterial infection causing dark leaf spots.

Tomato___Late_blight.description: Rapid leaf browning and fruit rot.

Tomato___Leaf_Mold.description: Yellow spots and mold under leaves.

Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.description: Leaves turn yellow due to mites.
